title: Add select/navigate issue command
description:
Add CLI command to select and navigate to a specific issue (already implemented as 'focus', but may need separate 'select' for clarity).

Command: kbs console select <issue-id>

Behavior:
- Opens detail panel for specified issue
- Updates selectedTask state
- Updates URL to /issues/<issue-id>
- Does NOT filter board (different from focus)
- Should match clicking an issue card

Implementation:
- Reuse existing IssueFocused event OR create new IssueSelected event
- Frontend handler navigates using navigate() function
- Should set selectedTask via route context automatically
creator: ryan.porter
